section: UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES - Periodic Transaction Report
free_text:
# UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES — Periodic Transaction Report

- **NAME:** Rohit Khanna
- **OFFICE TELEPHONE:** (202) 225-2631
- **[X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives** — State: CA, District: 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
- **[ ] Officer or Employee** — Employing Office: (blank) (File an original and 1 copy)
- **Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering?** Yes: [ ]  No: [X]
- **Initial report or amendment:** [X] Initial Report  [ ] Amendment
- **Date of Report Being Amended:** (blank)

Stamps/annotations:
- "HAND DELIVERED"
- "LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE [CENTER]" received stamp: "2017 MAY 11 AM 11:44 — OFFICE OF THE CLERK, U.S. HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES"
- Handwritten "Page 1 of 5" (the "5" handwritten)
- Handwritten initials next to "(For Official Use Only)"
- Printed notice: "A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late."

Transaction grid: greyed example row ("Example: Mega Corp. Common Stock", JT, Sale X, 02/05/015, 03/07/15, amount B X) ignored per spec. The only entry in the grid is the handwritten/typed text "Please see the attached" in the first asset-name cell; no checkboxes marked, no data rows.
